goal: Free self-hosted replacement for the paid iPhone-camera-into-OBS app: phone streams its camera into OBS with no per-month fee and no app install
step_further: Also usable as a Zoom/Teams webcam via OBS Virtual Camera, plus staged turnkey on the laptop so it runs with one command

criteria.desc: E2E: live WebRTC frames reach OBS receiver page
